title: heliconia regalis
intro: Heliconia regalis, also known as the royal heliconia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Heliconiaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Heliconia regalis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat wounds. The herbal preparations of Heliconia regalis are typically made into teas, infusions, or poultices, and are used to treat a variety of ailments, including colds, coughs, and skin conditions.
